steps.name: create-branch
steps.description: Create worktree, task branch, branch_info.txt, and full step-tracker plan.

steps.name: check-deps
steps.description: Verify t0008_port_modeldb_189347 is completed and understand its port pattern + answer asset.

steps.name: init-folders
steps.description: Create canonical task folder tree (code, data, results, research, plan, assets, intervention, logs).

steps.name: research-papers
steps.description: Review the existing DSGC paper corpus (tasks t0002, t0008) to establish what's already covered before hunting for missed models.

steps.name: research-internet
steps.description: Three-pass search: (a) full ModelDB sweep; (b) GitHub/OSF/Zenodo code hunt; (c) Google Scholar + bioRxiv forward citations of Poleg-Polsky, Schachter, Park, Sethuramanujam, Hanson.

steps.name: research-code
steps.description: Review t0008 port pattern, t0011 visualization library (if present), t0007 NEURON helpers, and t0012 scoring API to know the target interface any newly ported model must conform to.

steps.name: planning
steps.description: Plan the three-pass search, candidate triage, port-attempt criteria, downloaded-paper inclusion bar, and answer-asset structure. Budget $0.00, local-only.

steps.name: setup-machines
steps.description: Skipped: local-only workflow; any port attempts run on the existing NEURON install.

steps.name: implementation
steps.description: Run three-pass candidate search, download qualifying papers as paper assets, attempt to port runnable models (cloning repo + running demo), record per-candidate outcome in data/candidates.csv, and produce answer asset summarising findings.

steps.name: creative-thinking
steps.description: Skipped: literature-survey + port task with a fixed decision procedure; no exploratory variation within this task.

steps.name: results
steps.description: Write results_summary, results_detailed, metrics.json, costs.json, remote_machines_used.json, and any tuning-curve CSVs for ported models.

steps.name: compare-literature
steps.description: Compare newly ported models' tuning curves (if any) against t0008 Poleg-Polsky reproduction and the canonical target curve; flag systematic disagreements.

steps.name: suggestions
steps.description: Generate 3-6 follow-up suggestions based on search gaps, port failures, and the cross-model comparison.

steps.name: reporting
steps.description: Finalize task.json, run all verificators, capture sessions, push, open PR, merge.
